cmd:
cat > /root/autodeploy.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd /root/Iryna_Karmazina || exit 1
BEFORE=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
git pull --quiet
AFTER=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
if [ "$BEFORE" != "$AFTER" ]; then
    CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only $BEFORE $AFTER)
    BOT_CHANGED=$(echo "$CHANGED" | grep -E '^(agent_bot|bot)\.py$|^requirements\.txt$')
    RUNNER_CHANGED=$(echo "$CHANGED" | grep -E '^cmd_runner\.py$')
    if [ -n "$BOT_CHANGED" ]; then
        /root/Iryna_Karmazina/venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt
        systemctl restart mybot.service
    fi
    if [ -n "$RUNNER_CHANGED" ]; then
        systemctl restart cmdrunner.service
    fi
fi
EOF
chmod +x /root/autodeploy.sh && echo 'autodeploy.sh updated OK' && cat /root/autodeploy.sh
